{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321121717746EAD2ADDEA1BE39398"}"},"total":37},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609550269214393112","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可能屎吃多了，感觉这一本小说还行，至少行文流畅，不至于读起来都磕磕绊绊，平均线吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771738050,"group_id":"7588146058291596313","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N44jooXzspa6Qd0ml/5PlYQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"495224407726270","user_name":"用户49522440"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"495224407726270","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588146058291596313","book_info":{"abstract":"【注：本书国漫为主会有少量外国作品为辅】
【诸天万界】【单女主】【玩梗】【神人男主】【综漫】【系统存在感低】
浩瀚无穷的多元宇宙，不论再离奇的事情都有可能发生。
哪怕是0.000...1，只要有可能，就总有平行宇宙到达了这个结果。
小概率事件之下，本是时代浪潮下裹挟的一个普通人——常帆，幸运又不幸的成为了万业尸仙和成就系统的宿主，开始了向未来开拓的无尽之旅。
在一人之下世界普及修身炉，让人尽其才，物尽其用，爆炸式速度推进大同社会的到来。
在狐妖小红娘世界当带恶人，人妖和谐？我不同意！我要看到血流成河！命运的偏转下人妖双方疯狂军备竞赛，圈外乡巴佬进来被当路边一条踹死。
星穹铁道世界成为慈禧太后精神传人，向全体星神宣战！不要让战斗停下来啊！！！
常帆：我叫常帆，喜怒无常的常，云帆永济的帆。
【暂定流程：一人之下——成龙历险记——妖怪名单——狐妖小红娘——一拳超人——超神学院——星穹铁道】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/dc54c7122c3ddcd5c9394ce4ba229a62~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"尝鲸鹿","author_id":"","book_id":"7588146058291596313","book_name":"国漫：今日画风，多云转晴","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7627人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588147439266169369","read_count":"7627","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"359133"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"166","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,第一人称,穿越,系统,综漫,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dc54c7122c3ddcd5c9394ce4ba229a62~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250637&x-signature=yDHnKGas7SI%2B0MVWClqwGp70Eo4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1284683389220717","extra":{"comm
